items.title: MLB Power Rankings: A new No. 2 and an NL-heavy top 10 one month in
items.description: A new No. 2 and an NL-heavy top 10 dominate our rankings four weeks into the 2026 season.

items.title: Sources: Bucks finalizing deal to hire Jenkins
items.description: The Milwaukee Bucks are finalizing a deal to hire Taylor Jenkins as the franchise's new head coach, sources told ESPN on Thursday.

items.title: OKC's Williams has Grade 1 strain, week-to-week

items.title: Potential No. 1 pick Dybantsa enters NBA draft
items.description: AJ Dybantsa, the projected No. 1 pick this summer, has declared for the 2026 NBA draft, he announced on YouTube.

items.title: Harper: Phillies must weather storm; Walker cut
